<!-- Tip: Use /create-agent in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->
Please update the project's product specification document to reflect the new feature or change request. Follow the existing structure and formatting of the document, and ensure that the new information is clear, concise, and accurately represents the intended functionality or requirement. Use the appropriate sections and headings to organize the content, and maintain consistency with the style and tone of the existing document. 

Make sure to review the updated product specification for clarity and completeness before finalizing the changes.
